app_release_notes: v1.0.7 - Fixes progress bars that were not visible on Mac: the update-download meter and the 'Loading' indicators now show correctly.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.0.7 - Fixes progress bars that were not visible on Mac: the update-download meter and the 'Loading' indicators now show correctly.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.0.6 - A much bigger bullet library: hundreds of current match and hunting bullets added across .22 through .338, each with a sourced ballistic coefficient. Also more accurate predicted DOPE when two bullets share the same name and weight in different calibers.
